svg.title: AHS Realtors warm theme Facebook post
svg.desc: Wide horizontal post in off-white and terracotta with a hand-drawn courtyard scene featuring a Mediterranean arch, bougainvillea and the headline Come Home To The Quiet Side.

g.text: R E A L T O R S
Sea-facing residences in Emaar Crescent Bay,
from PKR 2.99 Cr. Private viewings welcome.
